---
title: "LRPDID07base: Waitlist-crossover observational pooled session-dose model for letter-sound knowledge (LS)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPDID07base is the pooled-dose comparator to LRPDID07. It uses the same P1/P2 rows, randomised arm, current treatment, pre-randomisation t1 letter-sound score and t1 age, but fits one treated-centred session slope across both periods rather than partially pooled period-specific slopes.

The pair is intended to be nested on identical outcome rows. Interpret the PSIS-LOO ranking only when `comparison_valid` is true; the comparison workflow checks convergence gates and pointwise row identities before computing an elpd difference.

_What this estimand is, and is not._ The per-period session count is observational and remains confounded by latent general ability and other determinants of attendance and learning. Arm, current treatment, t1 outcome and t1 age adjustment separates the randomised schedule and structural untreated zero from residual attendance variation; it cannot identify the causal effect of another session. The causal letter-sound result remains the randomised t2 contrast in LRPITT07/LRPDID02.

_Sign convention and the ceiling._ Positive `beta_dose` means higher-than-average attendance among treated rows is associated with a higher expected period-end score. The Beta-Binomial logit respects the bounded 0–32 score; it does not make the association causal.

## Model

$$
\eta_{i,p} = \alpha + \beta_{\text{period}}\,[p = \text{P2}]
           + \beta_{\text{group}}G_i + \theta_{\text{treated}}\,\text{Treated}_{i,p}
           + \beta_{\text{dose}}\,\text{dose\_treated\_std}_{i,p}
           + \gamma_{t1}\,\text{logit}_*(L_{t1,i}, N)
           + \gamma_A\,A_{t1,\text{std},i} + u_{\text{child},i},
$$

with a Beta-Binomial likelihood on the period post-count, $N = 32$, $G_i=1$ for the immediate arm, and `Treated` equal to 1 for immediate P1 and both P2 cells. `dose_treated_std` is centred and scaled among treated rows and set to zero for the untreated structural-zero cell; the t1 outcome is broadcast to both transition rows. Priors follow the shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_results_did.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
